impact: Advances the PP&D DevHub automation guardrails by proving sign application draft review remains preview-only and blocks official upload, certification, submission, payment, cancellation, and inspection scheduling unless the user confirms the exact action for the active session.
summary: Adds fixture-backed DevHub guardrail tests for sign application draft review preview and exact session-specific confirmation gates.
target_task: Task checkbox-102: Add DevHub guardrail tests proving sign application draft review can produce a preview but cannot perform official upload, certification, submission, payment, cancellation, or inspection scheduling without exact session-specific user confirmation.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
